scope: closure attempt for raw native/proxy get_app_state capture

summary.remainingGap: Codex-hosted Computer Use returns Calculator state, but raw stdio and proxied official client get_app_state calls still time out after app approval.

attempts.name: direct-native-app-name
attempts.command: CUA_AUTO_ACCEPT_ELICITATION=1 CUA_STATE_TIMEOUT_MS=90000 node scripts/probe-native-state.mjs Calculator m4-recheck
attempts.notes: initialize succeeded, elicitation/create was accepted, final tools/call response for id 2 timed out

attempts.name: direct-native-after-cleanup
attempts.command: CUA_AUTO_ACCEPT_ELICITATION=1 CUA_STATE_TIMEOUT_MS=45000 node scripts/probe-native-state.mjs Calculator m4-after-cleanup
attempts.notes: stale orphan proxy/client processes were cleaned before this run; timeout persisted

attempts.name: direct-native-bundle-id
attempts.command: CUA_AUTO_ACCEPT_ELICITATION=1 CUA_STATE_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 node scripts/probe-native-state.mjs com.apple.calculator m4-bundle-id
attempts.notes: bundle identifier input still timed out, so the blocker is not app-name resolution

attempts.name: direct-native-app-path
attempts.notes: absolute app path input still timed out, so the blocker is not app-name resolution

attempts.name: host-context-replay
attempts.notes: hosted initialize/capability/tool metadata replay still reproduced the native state gap

attempts.name: official-hosted-tool
attempts.notes: official hosted Computer Use returned Calculator app state and screenshot in the current Codex context

attempts.name: proxy-hosted-tool
attempts.notes: Codex reported tools/call timeout after about 120 seconds; latest proxy capture only showed initialize/tools-list/resource probes and did not contain a successful get_app_state response

conclusion: M4 cannot be honestly marked complete yet. Hosted state discovery is usable as the oracle, but raw native/proxy state capture remains blocked and should stay tracked as the active M4/M10.2 gap.
